missions.title: Current Electricity - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering electric current, drift velocity, mobility and more.

microtargets.title: Electric current
mustKnowFacts: Electric current is a fundamental subtopic of Current Electricity.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Electric current for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Electric current during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Electric current.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Electric current.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Electric current.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Electric current.
What is a common trap associated with Electric current?
